description: Complete power delivery chain from USB-C/MagSafe input to SoC power pins. 7 stages. Pro/Max variant with Austringer VR and CLVR instances. 42A SVR AON design.

stages.name: USB-C / MagSafe Input & Initial 5V
stages.description: 3 USB-C ports (2 left, 1 right) + MagSafe. CD3217 controllers manage CC signaling and VBUS switching.

stages.name: PD Negotiation & 20V Boost
stages.description: CD3217 reads firmware ROM, negotiates USB PD to 20V. SoC commands CD3217 after hard start.

stages.name: Charger -> PPBUS_AON
stages.description: Charger IC (U5200) converts input to PPBUS_AON. ARKANOID debug connector J5150 available. Multi-FET input stage with Q5216, Q5265, Q5270.

stages.name: SVR AON -> PP3V8_AON (42A Design)
stages.description: U5700 (RAA2255010-RC01) multi-phase buck converts PPBUS_AON to 3.8V always-on rail. 42A ICC MAX. 3 Iceman gate driver phases. Feeds SPMU, MPMU, WiFi/BT, display, and USB-C.

stages.name: PMU + Austringer + CLVR Distribution
stages.description: PP3V8_AON feeds SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100). Both generate SoC rails via bucks and LDOs. Austringer (U9300) produces PP1V8_S1_CLVR_VDDH which feeds all 5 CLVR instances. CLVR0-4 produce dynamic SoC domains (PCPU, GPU, Fabric, ANE).

stages.name: Standalone Regulators & Load Switches
stages.description: UC260 produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V, typ 6.4ms startup, 1.5MHz). Load switches gate power to USB-C ports, HDMI, SD card, and NAND.

stages.name: SoC Power Domains — M2 Pro/Max
stages.description: Final rails reaching SoC U6000 (M2 Pro/Max). PCPU via CLVR0, GPU via CLVR1/CLVR2, Fabric via CLVR3, ANE via CLVR4. ECPU and other domains via MPMU/SPMU bucks.
